## Checklist

- [ ] The link is live and loads correctly (not a parked domain, a 404, or a paywall-only page)
- [ ] It's in the correct section, and isn't already listed elsewhere in the README
- [ ] The description is one line, ends with a period, and doesn't just repeat the item's name
- [ ] I'm not affiliated with this listing — **or** I am, and I've said so below
